paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding the second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as a report on why the stock price tumbled more than 28% in after-hours trading. The earnings call is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026. Another headline discussed the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and the establishment of an Interim Office of the CEO.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a SCHEDULE 13G filing. Additionally, the company has issued $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Insider activity includes one Form 4 filing. Social media posts about the company include discussions of trading activity and stock price movements.
